description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code on push to master and development branches, on pull requests to those branches, and on a weekly schedule. Run the analysis on a windows-latest environment with read permissions for actions, contents, and write permission for security events. Analyze C++ code using CodeQL, checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, adding MSBuild to PATH, building with a PowerShell script, and then performing the CodeQL analysis.
